summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SingleStore Report Sniffer v1 - all features working perfectly
passed_tests: Browser tab title shows 'SingleStore Report Sniffer v1'
Large SingleStore logo in hero (280px wide)
Upload dropzone shows .tar.gz/.tgz and .zip format badges
File upload with streaming works (/tmp/report.tar.gz tested)
Report status endpoint returns progress data (stage=complete, pct=100, 10 nodes, 5000 log lines, 17 recommendations)
Dashboard sidebar shows large SingleStore white logo (160px)
All 7 sidebar tabs work (Overview, Nodes, Storage, Queries, Logs, Config, Issues)
Logs stored in separate MongoDB collection with search, severity filter, and node filter
Reports table shows file size column
Delete report cleans up logs from separate collection
All backend APIs working (14/14 tests passed)
